mission.title: helm: Can Helm support to ignore {{expr}} which is just for configuration but not render?
mission.description: Can Helm support to ignore {{expr}} which is just for configuration but not render?. Requested by 57+ users.

steps.title: Check current helm setup

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant helm configuration:
There is a use case: deploy Prometheus as StatefulSet and config alerting-rules as **ConfigMap**.
